name.en: Taizhou Aiyisi Leisure Products Co., Ltd.
name.zh: 台州爱以思休闲用品有限公司

markets.en: North America, Western Europe, Oceania, Mid East, Southern Europe
markets.zh: 北美、西欧、大洋洲、中东、南欧

region.zh: 中国 浙江 台州

rank.zh: 户外地毯类目 #1 热销

cats.en: Outdoor Rug|RV Mat|Patio Rug|Beach/Picnic Mat|Round Mat|Bath Mat|Pet Mat|Prayer Rug
cats.zh: 户外地垫|RV房车垫|露台垫|沙滩野餐垫|圆形地垫|浴室垫|宠物垫|祈祷垫

bigClients.en: Aldi, Lidl, The Home Depot, K-mart and other EU/US retail chains
bigClients.zh: Aldi、Lidl、The Home Depot、K-mart 等欧美连锁零售商

d.en: Supplier certified by TÜV Rheinland (the 'by TÜVRheinland' mark on the store homepage).
d.zh: 由 TÜV Rheinland 颁发的供应商认证（店铺首页 by TÜVRheinland 标识）。

t.zh: 实地核验与供应商评估

d.en: Factory verified by third-party onsite check; legal status confirmed by an independent verification company.
d.zh: 工厂已通过第三方机构实地核验（Onsite Check），法人资质经独立机构确认。

d.en: Selected large RV awning rugs are CE Certified for the European market.
d.zh: 部分大尺寸 RV 雨棚地垫产品已标注 CE 欧洲市场认证。

label.zh: 了解欧盟 CE 标准

d.en: Made of Recycled Polypropylene with raw-material identification and traceability.
d.zh: 主打再生 PP 环保材质，支持原材料识别与可追溯。

d.en: Full QC: incoming material inspection, finished-product inspection, material traceability.
d.zh: 提供来料检验、成品检验、原材料识别与追溯等全流程质控服务。

d.en: Drawing-based & sample-based customization; full OEM/ODM service.
d.zh: 支持图纸定制与打样定制，全定制 + ODM 服务。

t.zh: 国家/省级高新技术企业

d.en: Government-certified High-Tech Enterprise. Verifiable on China Ministry of Science and Technology platform.
d.zh: 国家/省级高新技术企业认定。可在中国科技部官方平台查询。

d.en: 9+ design and utility model patents filed with China National Intellectual Property Administration (CNIPA). Searchable by company name.
d.zh: 国家知识产权局（CNIPA）登记的产品设计与实用新型专利 9+ 项，可按公司名称查询。

label.zh: 国家知识产权局专利查询

t.zh: 纳税信用 A 级企业

d.en: Top-grade A-rated tax credit by State Taxation Administration of China — reflects 100% compliance and reliability.
d.zh: 国家税务总局评定的最高 A 级纳税信用 —— 反映 100% 合规与可靠性。

d.en: Serves major EU/US retail chains (Aldi, Lidl, Home Depot, K-mart). Strong bulk OEM/ODM experience; ideal for supermarket procurement and wholesale distributors.
d.zh: 主要服务 Aldi、Lidl、Home Depot、K-mart 等欧美大型连锁零售商，具备大宗 OEM/ODM 供货经验，适合商超采购、批发分销渠道买家。

d.en: North America (RV camping/patio), Western Europe (patio/garden), Oceania, Mid East (prayer rugs), Southern Europe.
d.zh: 北美（RV房车露营/庭院）、西欧（露台/花园）、大洋洲、中东（祈祷垫）、南欧。

d.en: RV camping, patio, poolside, picnic, beach, pet feeding mat, kids play mat, indoor/outdoor, prayer rug.
d.zh: RV房车露营、庭院露台、泳池边、野餐、沙滩、宠物喂食垫、儿童游戏垫、室内外通用、祈祷垫。

d.en: reversible, washable, waterproof, UV-resistant, recycled/eco-friendly, non-slip, lightweight, foldable.
d.zh: buyers高频关注：reversible(双面)、washable(可水洗)、waterproof(防水)、UV-resistant(抗UV)、recycled/eco(环保)、non-slip(防滑)、lightweight(轻便)、foldable(可折叠)。

d.en: Main band US$2-20/pc, MOQ 200-500 pcs; sample SKU MOQ as low as 3 pcs (e.g. the geometric reversible mat with 526 sold) usable as a traffic-driver for small trial orders.
d.zh: 主力价格带 US$2-20/件，起订量 200-500 件；样品款 MOQ 低至 3 件（如 526 sold 的几何双面垫），可作引流款撬动小单试单买家。

d.en: 12-yr factory + 25000m² + 200 machines + served Aldi/Lidl/Home Depot builds instant trust; 100% on-time + ≤3h response wins the inquiry-conversion window.
d.zh: 12年工厂 + 25000m² + 200设备 + 服务过 Aldi/Lidl/Home Depot 快速建立信任；100% 准时发货 + ≤3h 响应抢占询盘转化窗口。

c.en: Hi {Name}, thank you for your interest in our outdoor rugs! We are Aiyisi, a 12-year factory in Zhejiang specializing in reversible recycled-PP outdoor mats, serving Aldi, Lidl & The Home Depot. Could you share: 1) target size, 2) quantity, 3) destination country? I'll send you a tailored quote and free design catalog within 3 hours.
c.zh: 您好 {Name}，感谢您对我们户外地垫的关注！我们是爱以思，浙江一家有 12 年经验的工厂，专注双面再生 PP 户外垫，服务过 Aldi、Lidl 和 The Home Depot。能否告诉我：1）目标尺寸 2）数量 3）目的国？我会在 3 小时内为您发送定制报价和免费设计图册。

c.en: We are a TÜV-certified custom manufacturer with 25,000 m² factory, 200+ machines and 100% on-time delivery. Big retail clients include Aldi, Lidl, The Home Depot and K-mart.
c.zh: 我们是 TÜV 认证的定制制造商，拥有 25,000 m² 厂房、200+ 台设备，100% 准时发货。大型零售客户包括 Aldi、Lidl、The Home Depot 和 K-mart。

t.zh: 中文-内部询盘转化要点

c.en: [Internal] Reply within 3 hours of any inquiry (≤3h response is our core edge). In the first reply always ask the three essentials: size / quantity / destination country, and immediately drop the big-brand client endorsement + free catalog to build trust.
c.zh: 询盘进来 3 小时内必回（响应≤3h 是我们的核心优势）。首回必问三要素：尺寸 / 数量 / 目的国，并立刻甩大牌客户背书 + 免费图册建立信任。

c.en: Based on your request, our FOB Ningbo price is: {Size} reversible PP outdoor rug at USD {Price}/pc, MOQ {MOQ} pcs. Price includes recycled-PP material, jacquard weaving and standard export packing. Lead time: 25-35 days after deposit. Shall I arrange a sample for you?
c.zh: 根据您的需求，我们的 FOB 宁波报价为：{Size} 双面 PP 户外垫，USD {Price}/件，起订量 {MOQ} 件。价格含再生 PP 材料、提花编织和标准出口包装。交期：定金后 25-35 天。需要我为您安排样品吗？

c.en: We offer tiered pricing — the larger the order, the better the unit price. For example: 200 pcs at USD X, 500 pcs at USD Y, 1000+ pcs at USD Z. Let me know your target volume and I'll optimize the best price for you.
c.zh: 我们提供阶梯报价——订量越大，单价越优。例如：200 件 USD X，500 件 USD Y，1000+ 件 USD Z。告诉我您的目标数量，我帮您算出最优价格。

c.en: I understand price matters. Our rugs use 100% recycled PP and pass UV & anti-aging tests, so they last 2-3x longer than cheap imports — lower return rate for your store. If budget is tight, we can adjust pile height or size to fit your target price. What's your ideal landed cost?
c.zh: 我理解价格很重要。我们的地垫采用 100% 再生 PP，通过抗 UV 和抗老化测试，比廉价进口品耐用 2-3 倍——能降低您店铺的退货率。如果预算紧张，我们可调整绒高或尺寸来匹配您的目标价。您理想的到岸成本是多少？

c.en: For custom designs: 1) send us your pattern/logo or size, 2) we make a sample in 7-10 days, 3) sample fee USD {fee} (refundable on bulk order). We support drawing-based & sample-based customization. Reversible double-sided design and any size are available.
c.zh: 定制流程：1）发我们您的图案/LOGO 或尺寸 2）我们 7-10 天打样 3）样品费 USD {fee}（批量订单可退）。我们支持图纸定制和打样定制。双面可逆设计、任意尺寸均可。

c.en: Yes, we provide full OEM/ODM service — custom size, pattern, color, logo weaving and private-label packaging with carry bag. Our 2 R&D engineers can turn your idea into a production-ready design.
c.zh: 是的，我们提供完整 OEM/ODM 服务——定制尺寸、图案、颜色、LOGO 编织以及带手提袋的贴牌包装。我们的 2 名研发工程师能把您的想法变成可量产的设计。

c.en: [Internal] For custom patterns, confirm first: any copyright issue (cartoon/brand logos need authorization to avoid infringement); whether the size is standard (non-standard sizes raise tooling cost & MOQ); inform color batch variation in advance.
c.zh: 客户要定制图案先确认：是否涉及版权图案（卡通/品牌LOGO需授权，规避侵权）；尺寸是否标准（非标尺寸影响开机成本与MOQ）；颜色批次差异需提前告知。

c.en: Standard lead time is 25-35 days after deposit for MOQ orders. Large orders (1x40HQ) about 35-45 days. We guarantee 100% on-time shipment — it's tracked in our store record.
c.zh: 起订量订单标准交期为定金后 25-35 天。大订单（1x40HQ）约 35-45 天。我们保证 100% 准时发货——这在我们店铺记录中可查。

c.en: To calculate freight, our rugs are lightweight and foldable — a 20GP fits roughly {qty} pcs depending on size. Tell me your size and I'll confirm exact loading quantity and CBM.
c.zh: 关于运费，我们的地垫轻便可折叠——一个 20GP 视尺寸约可装 {qty} 件。告诉我您的尺寸，我确认准确的装柜量和体积（CBM）。

c.en: We accept FOB, CIF and DDP. For Trade Assurance orders you get 100% protection on quality and on-time shipment. Which Incoterm do you prefer?
c.zh: 我们接受 FOB、CIF 和 DDP。Trade Assurance 订单可获得质量和准时发货的 100% 保障。您倾向哪种贸易方式？

c.en: Our signature feature: fully reversible design — two looks in one rug. Customers flip it for a fresh pattern, doubling the value. Great selling point for retail shelves.
c.zh: 我们的招牌特点：完全双面可逆设计——一块地垫两种外观。客户翻面即换新图案，价值翻倍。是货架零售的绝佳卖点。

c.en: Made from recycled polypropylene — eco-friendly, 100% washable (just hose it down), waterproof, UV-resistant and anti-aging. Perfect for RV, patio, camping, beach and poolside.
c.zh: 采用再生聚丙烯制成——环保、100% 可水洗（冲一下即可）、防水、抗 UV、抗老化。适用于房车、露台、露营、沙滩和泳池边。

c.en: [Internal] Pitch selling points to EU/US buyers in this order: 1) reversible 2) recycled/eco (EU buyers love this most) 3) washable/waterproof 4) UV-resistant 5) lightweight/foldable (logistics-friendly).
c.zh: 对欧美买家按此优先级讲卖点：1) reversible 双面 2) recycled/eco 环保(欧盟买家最吃) 3) washable/waterproof 易打理 4) UV-resistant 耐用 5) lightweight/foldable 物流友好。

c.en: Hi {Name}, just following up on the outdoor rug quote I sent. Are there any questions I can help with? I can also send you our best-selling designs and a free sample arrangement to help you decide.
c.zh: 您好 {Name}，跟进一下我之前发的户外地垫报价。有什么我能帮您解答的吗？我也可以发您我们的热销款式并安排免费样品，方便您做决定。

c.en: Hi {Name}, hope you received our sample! How do you find the quality and texture? If everything looks good, I can lock in current pricing and reserve production slots for you before our peak season.
c.zh: 您好 {Name}，希望您已收到样品！您觉得质量和手感如何？如果都满意，我可以在旺季前为您锁定当前价格并预留生产排期。

c.en: Spring/summer is peak season for outdoor rugs and our lines fill up fast. To secure your delivery date, I'd recommend placing the order soon. Shall I prepare the PI for you?
c.zh: 春夏是户外地垫旺季，我们的产线排得很快。为确保您的交期，建议尽快下单。需要我为您准备形式发票（PI）吗？

c.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Please send photos/video of the issue and the order number. We take quality seriously — all orders are protected by Trade Assurance. We'll investigate and offer a fair solution (replacement/refund) immediately.
c.zh: 很抱歉听到这个问题。请发我问题的照片/视频和订单号。我们非常重视质量——所有订单都受 Trade Assurance 保障。我们会立即核查并提供公平的解决方案（补发/退款）。

c.en: [Internal] For after-sales complaints: empathize first, then ask for evidence (photo/video + order number); keep everything on-platform via Trade Assurance; never promise off-platform compensation; verify quality issues internally before offering a solution to avoid over-promising.
c.zh: 售后投诉先共情再要证据（图/视频+订单号），全程走 Trade Assurance 留痕；不在平台外承诺私下赔付；质量问题先内部核验再给方案，避免口头承诺超出权限。

d.en: AIYISI
d.zh: 爱以思 / AIYISI

d.en: Taizhou Aiyisi Leisure Products Co., Ltd.
d.zh: 台州爱以思休闲用品有限公司

d.en: A 12-year ODM factory focused on outdoor PP woven rugs; recycled material + reversible design; targeting EU/US retail and RV camping markets.
d.zh: 专注户外 PP 编织地垫的 12 年 ODM 工厂，环保再生材料 + 双面可逆设计，主攻欧美商超与 RV 露营市场。

d.en: Outdoor Rug / RV Mat / Patio Rug / Beach & Picnic Mat / Round Mat / Bath Mat / Pet Mat / Prayer Rug
d.zh: 户外地垫 / RV房车垫 / 露台垫 / 沙滩野餐垫 / 圆形地垫 / 浴室垫 / 宠物垫 / 祈祷垫

d.en: North America · Western Europe · Oceania · Mid East · Southern Europe
d.zh: 北美 · 西欧 · 大洋洲 · 中东 · 南欧

d.en: TÜV Rheinland certified · #1 Best Seller in Outdoor Carpets · Serves Aldi/Lidl/Home Depot/K-mart
d.zh: TÜV Rheinland 认证 · 户外地毯类目 #1 · 服务 Aldi/Lidl/Home Depot/K-mart

d.en: Bohemian mandala, geometric stripes, Moroccan florals, nautical themes; earth tones plus bold contrasts, fitting EU/US patio & camping aesthetics.
d.zh: 波西米亚曼陀罗、几何条纹、摩洛哥花纹、航海主题；大地色系与高饱和撞色并存，适配欧美庭院与露营审美。

t.zh: 供应欧洲连锁商超 (Aldi / Lidl)

d.en: Long-term OEM/ODM supplier of reversible recycled-PP outdoor rugs for major European discount retail chains, with stable bulk orders and strict QC compliance.
d.zh: 为欧洲大型折扣连锁商超长期 OEM/ODM 供应双面再生 PP 户外地垫，订单稳定、严格质控达标。

t.en: North America - The Home Depot / K-mart
t.zh: 北美 - The Home Depot / K-mart

d.en: Customized patio & RV mats for North American home-improvement and retail chains, meeting CE and BSCI standards for the US/EU market.
d.zh: 为北美家居建材与零售连锁定制露台垫与房车垫，满足欧美市场 CE、BSCI 标准。

d.en: Full custom service: client patterns, sizes, logos and private-label packaging. 2 R&D engineers turn buyer designs into production-ready products.
d.zh: 全定制服务：客户图案、尺寸、LOGO 与贴牌包装。2 名研发工程师将买家设计转化为可量产产品。

name.en: Canton Fair
name.zh: 广交会

subtitle.en: China Import and Export Fair · Pavilion 11.1/12.1
subtitle.zh: 中国进出口商品交易会 · 11.1/12.1 馆

desc.en: AIYISI has been a continuous exhibitor at the Canton Fair for 6+ editions, with a dedicated booth in the Outdoor & Leisure pavilion. It is our most important platform to meet global buyers face-to-face every spring and autumn.
desc.zh: 爱以思连续 6+ 届亮相广交会，常驻户外休闲品馆，是我们每年春秋两季与全球采购商面对面的核心平台。

name.en: Spoga+Gafa
name.zh: Spoga+Gafa

subtitle.en: World's largest outdoor & garden trade fair

desc.en: Spoga+Gafa is the world's premier exhibition for outdoor lifestyle and garden trade. AIYISI showcases here to connect with European buyers and global distributors of outdoor textiles.
desc.zh: Spoga+Gafa 是全球户外生活与园艺贸易的顶级展会。爱以思在此展示新品，对接欧洲采购商与全球户外纺织品分销商。

name.en: Spoga+Gafa 2024

name.en: Heimtextil
name.zh: Heimtextil

subtitle.zh: 国际家纺及合约纺织品展

desc.en: Heimtextil in Frankfurt is the leading international trade fair for home and contract textiles. AIYISI presents its premium reversible PP woven rug collection here to global home-textile buyers.
desc.zh: Heimtextil 法兰克福家纺展是国际家纺与合约纺织品的顶级展会。爱以思在此向全球家纺采购商展示双面可逆 PP 编织地垫系列。

name.zh: 中国品牌澳洲展

location.zh: 澳大利亚 悉尼/墨尔本

subtitle.zh: 代表中国优质制造出海

desc.en: As a representative of premium Chinese manufacturing, AIYISI participated in the China Brand Fair held in Australia, expanding its presence in the Oceania outdoor & home market.
desc.zh: 作为中国优质制造代表，爱以思参加在澳大利亚举办的中国品牌展，拓展大洋洲户外与家居市场。

name.en: China Brand Fair Australia
name.zh: 中国品牌澳洲展
